name: BIND9 query log
sampleLines: 28-Apr-2024 04:02:03.123 queries: info: client 10.0.0.1#54321 (example.com): query: example.com IN A + (10.0.0.53)
28-Apr-2024 04:02:04.456 queries: info: client @0x7f1234567890 192.168.1.5#33445 (api.example.com): query: api.example.com IN AAAA +E(0)K (192.168.1.53)

description: Adapted from logstash-plugins/logstash-patterns-core patterns/ecs-v1/bind (Apache-2.0), entry BIND9_QUERYLOG. Inlined %{BIND9_TIMESTAMP} (DD-Mon-YYYY HH:MM:SS.fff), %{IP:client.ip}, %{POSINT:client.port}, %{HOSTNAME:question}, %{NOTSPACE:dns.question.*}, %{IP:server.ip} to plain PCRE2.
